title: Growth in Coal India's Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, Coal India (which is responsible for over 75% of India's coal output) produced approximately 62.1 million tons of coal last month. This is down month-on-month by 23.7 million tons (-28%) but is up year-on-year by 300,000 tons (1%). It is normal for production to plummet in April (a surge always occurs in March).
